projects.title: Machine learning based comparative performance  analysis for Alzheimer disease
projects.teamMembers: Vaishnavi Chopade ,Sai Chopade  ,Parth Halwane  ,Shivarth Gangurde
projects.description:
This paper discusses the effectiveness of different 
machine learning algorithms in the prediction of Alzheimer's, 
considering a dataset which integrates demographic, lifestyle, 
clinical, and cognitive assessments. Early detection of Alzheimer's 
is critical and becomes more so because this disease is one of the 
main causes of dementia, but complex factors often contribute to it.

projects.title: SMART ENERGY MONITORING SYSTEM    FOR HOUSEHOLD APPLIANCES
projects.teamMembers: Ninad Padamwar ,Piyush More, Nivesh Koskewad
projects.description:
With each passing day, the demand for electricity 
in urban areas grows at an alarming rate, bringing with it the 
socioeconomic woes of soaring utility costs for the residents as 
well as unprecedented strain on the electricity distribution 
network.Proposed system aims to fix the issue in hand by 
succession of smart technologies to estimate the energy 
demand on an household and break it down to individual 
device level using machine learning.

projects.title: Helping Hands: A Machine Learning Approach to Prioritizing NGO Assistance
projects.teamMembers: DHRUV VASWANI , MASEERA SHAIKH ,SIDDHI CHINTAWAR, ARYA CHINTAWAR
projects.description:
Despite growing willingness to contribute towards social
causes, a persistent gap exists between donors and
organizations in need due to limited visibility, communication
barriers and lack of trust. Helping hands is a web-based
humanitarian aid platform designed to reduce this gap by
enabling direct, transparent and efficient interaction between
donors, volunteers and Non-Governmental Organizations
(NGOs). The platform allows NGOs and community helpers
to post real-time requests for resources such as food,
clothing, medical supplies and educational support, while
donors can easily discover opportunities aligned with their
intent to help.

projects.title: Environmental Monitoring System Using IOT and  Machine Learning Models
projects.teamMembers: Aditya Anil Nikam ,Chaitanya Prashant Atale,Sarfaraz Saifullah Khan  ,Sashant Sanjay Nipate
projects.description:
Environmental factors such as air 
quality, PM2.5 levels, temperature, and humidity 
are all critical factors for public health, especially 
in Urban cities. The problem is that traditional 
monitoring stations are expensive and to spread out 
to provide good local data. To bridge this gap, our 
paper presents a low-cost, real-time IoT system for 
monitoring 
and 
forecasting 
environmental 
conditions.

projects.title: Dynamic Preprocessing Algorithm for Handwritten Prescription Images - Boosting OCR Accuracy
projects.teamMembers: Atharva Joshi, Aditya Metkar , Prathmesh Kolekar
projects.description: We introduce a Dynamic Preprocessing Algorithm for Handwritten Prescription Images, designed to optimize Optical Character Recognition (OCR) by improving text extraction accuracy and computational efficiency. The preprocessing method includes Contrast Limited Adaptive Histogram Equalization (CLAHE) for contrast enhancement, median filtering and Gaussian blurring for noise reduction.

projects.title: AI-Driven Fault Diagnosis in 3-Phase Induction  Motors: A Hybrid ML Approach
projects.teamMembers: Dhanashree Suresh Yadav , Neha Nandkumar Mahajan  ,Santrupti Ashok Golhar , Sayali Rajendra Patil
projects.description:
This project presents an AI-powered fault diagnosis system that leverages machine learning 
(ML) and deep learning (DL) techniques to enhance fault classification accuracy in 3-phase 
induction motors. The proposed system integrates Support Vector Machines (SVM), 
Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN), Bidirectional Long Short-Term Memory (BiLSTM), 
and Extreme Gradient Boosting (XGBoost) to extract meaningful fault-related features from 
sensor data and improve classification performance. The hybrid approach combines the 
strengths of individual models, improving robustness and adaptability in diagnosing motor faults.

projects.title: PrepPro: A Scalable, Efficient and Self-hosted Quiz  Portal for Academic Institution using Microservice  based Architecture
projects.teamMembers: Rushikesh Biradar,  Suyash Gadhave , Shailesh Kaliya , Koustubh Kulkarni
projects.description:
This system provides a student-friendly interface to practice aptitude, core subject MCQs, and MSQs 
(Multiple Select Questions), while offering a powerful admin dashboard for teachers to create, schedule, and 
manage tests effortlessly. It empowers faculty to analyze individual and batch-level performance, track student 
improvement over time, and generate actionable insights.

projects.title: An AI-Driven Recommendation System for Formative Assessment Tools in Engineering
projects.teamMembers: LOKESH ASHISH BHARAMBE,AKSHIT AGARWAL,KAPISH BHAMBHANI,PRAJWAL DHURDE
projects.description:
Formative assessment (FA) is important in student assessment 
and learning, but it is difficult to choose FA tool which suits 
all students. In our case there are some FA tools that does not 
contribute in learning at all but for marks we have to do that. 
Hence to solve this problem we have developed or build a 
smart FA recommendation system by using machine learning 
by considering each and every student in a class.

projects.title: EnneaAssess: A Cognitive-Emotional Assessment Framework Based on Enneagram Personality Theory.
projects.teamMembers: Aarya Hire, Kartik Jagtap, Chetan Ladkat ,Sonali Mankare
projects.description:
EnneaAssess: Tailoring Educational Evaluations Based on Enneagram Personality Insights
introduces a transformative framework for personalizing assessments in education by integrating
psychological profiling with pedagogical strategy. Recognizing the limitations of one-size-fits-all
evaluation methods, this project leverages the Enneagram—a dynamic model of nine core personality
types—to craft nuanced assessment experiences that align with individual learners’ cognitive,
emotional, and motivational profiles.

projects.title: EnneaAssess: Tailoring Educational Evaluations Based on Enneagram Personality Insights introduces a transformative framework for personalizing assessments in education by integrating psychological profiling with pedagogical strategy. Recognizing the limitations of one-size-fits-all evaluation methods, this project leverages the Enneagram—a dynamic model of nine core personality types—to craft nuanced assessment experiences that align with individual learners’ cognitive, emotional, and motivational profiles.
projects.teamMembers: Ayush Dongardive , Sakshi Shitolev , Rushali Guldagad , Tushar Mahajan
projects.description:
Breast cancer remains a major health challenge globally,
where early and accurate diagnosis is crucial for improving patient
outcomes. Traditional diagnostic methods relying on radiologists can be
time-consuming and prone to human error. This study presents Agentic
AI for Breast Cancer Analysis, an intelligent, multi-agent system
designed to enhance detection and personalized care.

projects.title: Novel Approach on User Match Making using LLM Generated Vectors from Youtube’s Recommendation Algorithm
projects.teamMembers: Atharva Galne,Vaibhav Gangurde,Utkarsh Patil,Sarthak Kshirsagar
projects.description:
This research explores an automated approach to user
profiling by analyzing YouTube recommendations, which are shaped by deep learning-based content suggestion algorithms.
Our method involves collecting video recommendations and subscription data, categorizing them into a structured interest
taxonomy, and representing users as vectorized interest profiles. To enhance classification, large language models (LLMs) extract
key interest categories from video metadata.

projects.title: Modular Battery Management System with Machine Learning-Driven State-of- Health Estimation: Design, Implementation, and Comparative Analysis for  Electric Vehicle Applications
projects.teamMembers: Nirbhik Navin,Aditya Pokharana,Arnav Patel
projects.description:
This paper introduces a full-fledged solution integrating
hardware and software design of a modular Battery Management System (BMS) and machine learning (ML)
models for State of Health (SOH) estimation. The proposed BMS is a master-slave architecture system consisting
of LTC6812 ICs for cell-level monitoring and an STM32F446RE microcontroller as a master unit. The system
permits real-time State of Charge (SOC) estimation, thermal and current management, capacity tracking, and cell
balancing under rigorous communication protocols.

projects.title: Handwriting Analysis for Personality Prediction and  Career Counseling
projects.teamMembers: Aparna Hatte  ,Divya Pawar  ,Damini Pawar,Siddhesh Varude
projects.description:
One unique biometric feature that shows not only motor skills 
but also sophisticated cognitive and psychological processes is 
handwriting. Its ability to encode faint behavioural clues makes 
it a useful tool for personality evaluation. Leveraging both 
Machine Learning (ML) and Deep Learning (DL) approaches, 
this work proposes an automated data-driven system for 
predicting personality traits by handwriting analysis.

projects.title: AI Smart Assistant for Museums using  Machine Learning
projects.teamMembers: Kshitij Guladhe  , Anurag Mishra , Rohit Wankar , Ramvijay yadav
projects.description:
Multilingual Chat-Bot Assistance project is a state-of-the-art endeavor de-
signed to improve visitor interaction and education. In order to develop an AI-driven

interactive system, this project makes use of chatbot technologies, machine learning, ar-
tificial intelligence, and natural language processing. In order to raise awareness of the

Ganga River's historical, cultural, and environmental significance, the initiative presents
a digital avatar and a real robot mascot.

projects.title: FinAlytic: GenAI-Driven Financial Insights for Generating Detailed Analytical Reports Using LLaMA 3.3
projects.teamMembers: Soham Narsale , Sana Sampson,Sayali Jadhao , Ashirwad Kankaria
projects.description:
The project focuses on leveraging Generative AI to address challenges in financial document processing, market
analysis, and financial advisory services. By implementing tools like Document Question Answering, Financial
Document Summarization, and Portfolio Optimization, the project aims to streamline processes for analysts,
investors, and financial institutions. The proposed solutions offer quick retrieval of information, automate
document classification, enhance market prediction accuracy, and provide personalized financial advice. These
tools not only reduce manual effort but also enable informed decision-making in a fast-paced financial
environment.

projects.title: CityAssist: AI-Powered Complaint Redressal and  Management Platform for Citizens
projects.teamMembers: Shubham Singh , Yash Sonar, Swapnil Thorat , Om Satturwar
projects.description:
This paper presents CityAssist, an AI-powered web
platform designed to streamline the complaint redressal process

for urban citizens. CityAssist integrates geolocation, image anal-
ysis, and large language models (LLMs) to validate, categorize,

and route citizen complaints to relevant municipal authorities.
The system ensures only valid complaints are escalated, employs
automated image captioning and categorization, and features
public engagement tools such as upvoting, commenting, and
real-time status tracking.

projects.title: Quantum-Enhanced Neural Networks for Brain Stroke Classification: A Comparative Study of Classical and Hybrid  Approaches
projects.teamMembers: Sambhav Patil  , Yash Patil , Jivan Karande  , Prathamesh  Lohar
projects.description:
This study presents a comparative analysis of traditional deep learning and a novel quantum-
assisted neural network for brain stroke identification on brain CT images. We compared traditional

convolutional neural network (CNN) architectures such as ResNet18, VGG16, MobileNetV2 and In-
ceptionV3. We found a hybrid quantum-classical approach which incorporated ResNet and MobileNet

feature extraction tools and combined the extracted features in a quantum circuit for processing.

projects.title: Quantum-Enhanced Neural Networks for Brain Stroke Classification: A Comparative Study of Classical and Hybrid  Approaches
projects.teamMembers: Parth Singhal,Shreeraj Patil,Zavi Shaikh,Piyush Agarwal
projects.description:
The growing number of audio deepfakes calls for

strong detection tools to protect digital security and voice authen-
tication. Presenting a sophisticated deepfake detection system that

uses Constant Q Cepstral Coefficients (CQCC) and a multi-scale

neural network with hierarchical attention, we get state-of-the-
art performance on the ASVspoof 2019 benchmark. Our model

achieves a record 4.91% Equal Error Rate (EER) by exposing
minor synthetic artefacts via phase-aware feature extraction and
adaptive attention techniques,

projects.title: Enhancing Healthcare Data Privacy: Secure Aggregation in Federated Learning
projects.teamMembers: Om Bhavsar,Minal Azad,Harshad Gholve
projects.description:
In this study, a privacy-preserving FL
framework is proposed for Parkinson’s disease
classification, leveraging a novel hybrid encryption
approach combining CKKS homomorphic encryption
(ELSA) and Fernet symmetric encryption (Prio+). This
dual-encryption strategy ensures enhanced security
while maintaining efficient model training. At the core
of the framework lies the HybridComplexANN model, a
dual-path neural architecture that processes both
complex-valued and real-valued features.

projects.title: AI-Powered Legal Document Analysis and Compliance Assistant
projects.teamMembers: Dharin Dave  , Harshraj Chouhan  , Sakshi Jambhulkar  , Yash Agarwal
projects.description:
The legal and compliance landscape is becoming increasingly complex, requiring businesses and

legal professionals to navigate a myriad of regulations and contractual obligations. The "AI-
Powered Legal Document Analysis and Compliance Assistant" aims to revolutionize this process

by leveraging advanced artificial intelligence (AI) and machine learning (ML) techniques. This
platform is designed to analyze legal documents, identify potential compliance issues, and provide
actionable recommendations for risk mitigation.

projects.title: AI-Powered System Cybersecurity Operations and  Incident Response
projects.teamMembers: Lokesh Kad,  Anurag Karpe ,Pratham Kubetkar ,Varad Sawant
projects.description:
Cyber incidents have become more sophisticated and frequent, which emphasizes the importance of
automated AI systems for the proactive response to cyber incidents. The report suggests a
comprehensive analysis of the new trends in the field of AI-based cybersecurity, using three basic
blocks: detection of network anomalies, fine-tuning of large language models (LLMs) for the
classification of emails, and detection of malware.

projects.title: Drone based System for dehazing the smoke and detection of human presence.
projects.teamMembers: CHETAN INDULKAR,GAUTAM BHAGAT,PRANAV KALE,ATHARV POWALKAR
projects.description:
In emergency scenarios, clear visibility is crucial for effective decision-making and rescue operations.
Our dehazing device/software is designed to enhance real-time video feeds by instantly clearing smoke,
providing firefighters and emergency responders with critical clarity. Unlike traditional methods, this
innovative technology processes live video feeds to mitigate smoke interference, ensuring a clear view
of the environment. The integration of advanced human detection further enhances its utility, making it
an essential tool for various emergency response fields. This device not only improves situational
awareness but also enhances safety and response efficiency in smoke-obscured environments.
